goal: 给 Catty v0 持久 prediction 增加 daily report CLI

summary.title: 接入持久 prediction 日报入口
summary.what: 为 Catty v0 新增只读 daily report CLI：src/catty/report.ts 从 Catty SQLite store 读取 catty_predictions 与 catty_memory_audit，按 --date 生成 generateDailyReport 的 JSON 输出；默认读取 live events.sqlite，可用 --store-db 覆盖。没有 catty_predictions 表时返回空 report，且不创建表、不写库。新增 focused 测试覆盖非空持久 judgement/feedback/memory audit 聚合，以及无 Catty 表时空 report 不建表；README 补入口说明。
summary.why: 前序切片已经能手动记录 shadow prediction、手动 judge 并写回 judgement；要让 v0 更接近 dogfood，需要先能从持久评估数据生成开发期日报，暴露 judged count、intent-weighted average、hardest misses、过宽比例、memory audit 和 visible feedback，而不是继续只看单条 judgement。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 持久 prediction 增加 daily report CLI

decisions.chose: 补只读 persisted daily report CLI，而不是接 heartbeat 调度或 memory admission。
decisions.rationale: 日报是 v0 反漂移仪表盘，能把已有 prediction/judgement 数据变成趋势和审计面；调度与 memory canary 仍需后续独立切片。

decisions.chose: report.ts 永远只读，不创建表、不写 live DB。
decisions.rationale: report 是观察面，不应污染 prediction eval 或 memory admission；没有 Catty 表时返回空 report，方便安全 smoke。

decisions.chose: 复用 generateDailyReport 和 SqliteCattyStore，而不是重新 SQL 聚合。
decisions.rationale: runtime 已经定义 v0 日报口径；CLI 只做持久 store 读取和参数解析，避免出现两套 metric 定义。

decisions.chose: 把 int_5b87e237、int_d0d9d89f、int_89989c5b、int_2dd4c8cc、int_d2f08a4a、int_22f3a69f 视为同一 Catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 它们分别完成 trail、judge seam、runtime、store、shadow CLI、judge-record；本轮在这些基础上补 report，不反向改变核心决策，不是语义冲突。

rejected.alternative: 直接把 report 接入 launchd heartbeat
rejected.reason: 会把调度策略和 report 读面耦合，超出本轮最小可验证范围。

rejected.alternative: report 缺表时自动创建 Catty schema
rejected.reason: 报告命令应保持只读；自动建表会让 dry-run/live smoke 产生 side effect。

rejected.alternative: 在 report CLI 里重新 SQL 聚合指标
rejected.reason: 会和 runtime.generateDailyReport 的反漂移口径分叉。

review_notes: TDD RED：新增 report.test.ts 后，bun test src/catty/report.test.ts 失败于缺少 ./report 模块。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/report.test.ts，2 pass，12 expect。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/report.test.ts src/catty/judge-record.test.ts src/catty/shadow.test.ts src/catty/sqlite-store.test.ts src/catty/catty-v0.bdd.test.ts，10 pass，71 expect。
验证通过：bun test，21 pass，108 expect。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
CLI smoke：bun src/catty/report.ts --help 输出预期 usage。
live read-only smoke：bun src/catty/report.ts --date 2026-05-27 返回 total=0、memoryAudit 全 0；没有写 live DB。
临时 SQLite 非空 CLI smoke：total=1、judged=1、intentWeightedAverage=0.8、memoryAudit accepted=1 trialHeuristics=2。

live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true；本次刚好跑 full pipeline，observe/refresh/dream/embed/notify/doctor 均 ok。launchd lastExitCode=2 的尾部日志显示 heartbeat skipped: locked，err log 为空，符合手动 live status 与 launchd 同时触发的暂态锁。
提交 ee38976 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/report.ts、src/catty/report.test.ts；worktree 仍有既有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty，未 stage、未提交。

subsystems: Catty v0 SQLite store read-only reporting
architectural_claims: Persisted daily reporting now reads the same CattyStore-backed records used by prediction and judgement persistence.
Report generation remains a read-only development dashboard surface and does not write prediction, judgement, or memory data.
The report CLI reuses runtime.generateDailyReport so the persisted report and in-memory BDD report share the same anti-drift metric definitions.
Missing Catty tables are treated as an empty report state, enabling safe live smoke before any prediction has been written.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/report.ts prints a daily report JSON for the current UTC date by default.
bun src/catty/report.ts --date YYYY-MM-DD reports a specific date.
--store-db PATH reads Catty prediction/audit tables from an explicit SQLite DB.
When catty_predictions is absent, report.ts returns zero prediction counts, zero score, empty hardestMisses, zero broadPredictionRate, and empty memory audit without creating tables.
Persisted reports include judged counts, shadow/visible counts, intentWeightedAverage, hardestMisses, broadPredictionRate, memoryAudit, and visibleHelpfulness.
security_implications: report.ts reads only Catty prediction/audit tables and does not read ~/.agents/memory/config.json, payload_json, API keys, cookies, or provider env vars.
The command performs no model calls and has no --pi path.
The command opens the store read-only when Catty tables exist and returns an in-memory empty report when they do not.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; the command reads existing SqliteCattyStore tables when present.
Existing prediction, judge-record, shadow, and runtime APIs are unchanged.
